## Feature

Describe the feature.

## User workflow

Describe the intended user flow, preferably mobile-first.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1

## Constraints

- [ ] Must preserve mobile-web-first UX
- [ ] Must preserve tenant isolation where relevant
- [ ] Must preserve Azure migration readiness
- [ ] Must use provider adapters for external services where relevant
- [ ] AI-generated record changes require user confirmation where relevant
- [ ] LinkedIn automation/scraping is not allowed

Add context, examples, sketches, or references.
